items.title: Daily Attendance is Mandatory
items.text: Students who remain inactive may be removed from the community.

items.title: Weekly Exam Notice
items.text: Weekly exams are held every Thursday based on the week's lessons.

items.title: New Beginner Batch
items.text: A new beginner batch is starting soon. Stay connected for details.

items.title: Upcoming Speaking Class
items.text: A special speaking practice class is coming this Friday.

items.title: Community Rules
items.text: Please follow community rules and be respectful to everyone.
